<thought>

</thought>

MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>

MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to move right toward it. First I must turn to face right, and the cell to the right is safe floor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT

<thought>
